## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added for new functionality (or reason why not)
- [ ] `npm test` passes locally (`cd proxy && npm test`)
- [ ] `bash -n install.sh` passes
- [ ] Docs / README updated if user-facing change
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` entry added under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] No secrets or tokens in the diff
